content: July kickoff — push ESA attach hard this month. Every warranty is 5% straight into your pocket. Piercing is 2%. No excuses.
Regional shoutout: our district led ALL regions on St. Jude round-ups this cycle — $3,227.68 collected. Jewelry with heart wins.
St. Jude LEADERBOARD: Emily M. at Store 3739 tops the district with $975 collected. Y'all better catch up.
Cottonwood pulled $852 in St. Jude round-ups. So proud of my team. Diamond Champion earned.
Cherry Creek team — coffee's on me if we hit 105% today. Let's move.
Achievement: Kimberly Toledo (Store 3922) — 116.69% to sales plan yesterday. $1,311 in one day. That's the standard.
Park Meadows piercing walk-ins already 4-deep at open. Big day incoming.
TOP INDIVIDUAL DONOR: Brianna Sutton — $402 in personal St. Jude round-ups this cycle. She's carrying the district. Gold Pin unlocked.
Coronado North team crushed piercing plan yesterday. Body Jewelry section is a machine right now.
Ky Malone — $304 personal St. Jude donation. Gold Pin earned. Second highest individual in the district.
Mesa Mall — small store big heart. $514 in St. Jude and we're just getting started.
First sale of the day $1,250 + ESA attached.
Christina Harps — $264 personal St. Jude donation. Gold Pin earned.
Aurora — St. Jude round-up on EVERY transaction today. Corporate is watching. Amanda will notice.
Alyssa Vanegas (Store 242) — $825 in sales, 100% to piercing plan. Aurora is heating up.
Chapel Hills — new bold-goal board is up in the back. Come check it before your shift.
Carolina Rodriguez — $132 personal donation. Silver Pin unlocked.
Flatiron — St. Jude ask up 40% since last week. Y'all listened. Diamond Champion status for the store.
Jared Blalock — $125. Martin France — $123. Mollie Grubbs — $109. Silver Pins across the board.
Citadel — 20% off clearance is CRUSHING for us. Push it. Every clearance ring gets a chance at ESA attach.
Achievement: Elisabeth Free (Store 1026) — $566 sales, 24% to plan. Steady and consistent.
Santa Fe — remember to book piercing appointments online. Two big walk-in groups turned away yesterday. That's money lost.
Store 3739 Coronado South leads the district — $975 in St. Jude donations. Diamond Champion Pin awarded to Emily M.
Reminder: FY27 commission tiers are live. Level 1 unlocks at $50k annual OR $4,250 this July. Check your Me tab for your countdown.
Leya-mae Palomino — $104. Trescelle Rodriguez — $85. Leuree Martinez — $82. Every dollar matters.
